props_visible: Coffee cherry branch with red cherries and green leaves

text_overlays.content_summary: عبرلنا ايش تعنيلك القهوة ؟ — Tell us, what does coffee mean to you?

notable_visual_elements: Coffee cherry branch (farm-to-cup origin signal) used as decorative element
عبرلنا is Saudi/Gulf dialect — direct casual address
Illustrated style consistent with recent Barns visual identity shift

hospitality_cues: coffee culture framing — القهوة carries hospitality heritage in Saudi culture
cultural_notes.free_notes: In Saudi culture, قهوة (coffee/qahwa) carries deep hospitality heritage beyond the modern specialty coffee context. The question 'ايش تعنيلك القهوة' (what does coffee mean to you) taps into both the cultural depth and the personal modern relationship with coffee. Smart engagement play: it simultaneously invites comment boxes while positioning the brand as part of a meaningful ritual.

pattern_matches.notes: Direct community question 'ايش تعنيلك القهوة' — pure curiosity gap engagement mechanic
Tied to World Coffee Day season; coffee origin (cherry branch) used as visual anchor
Coffee meaning question invites community to voice their personal Saudi coffee relationship
